user_prompt: Hi! Before we start, let me introduce myself: my name is Quan, I live in Da Nang, my younger sister is called Hoa, and my lucky number is 17. Now, what is a simple breathing exercise I can do at my desk when I feel stressed?
model_response: hey quan nice to meet ya 🙌💥 a simple breathing exercise you can do is the 4-7-8 technique 🧘‍♂️💨 just breathe in for 4 seconds hold for 7 seconds and exhale for 8 seconds it’s super chill and helps with stress for real give it a try! ✨🔥
